modelName: Signature Enamelled Cast Iron Round Casserole 20cm
description: This 20cm Signature Round Casserole in Matte Black is the professional standard for high-performance slow cooking. This specific 2.4-litre variant distinguishes itself from the Classic range by featuring 45% larger handles for easier handling with oven mitts and an upgraded, toughened sand-coloured interior enamel that is more resistant to staining and dulling. The lid is fitted with a heat-resistant stainless steel knob, rated for temperatures up to 260°C. Perfect for side dishes or small main meals, it provides exceptional heat retention and is fully induction compatible.
features: Enamelled Cast Iron Construction, 20cm Diameter, 2.4L Capacity, Matte Black Finish, Induction Compatible Base, Oven Safe to 260°C.
uses: Slow cooking, braising, baking, searing, stewing.

accessories.name: Heavy Cast Iron Lid
accessories.description: Precision-fitting lid with stabilizers to seal in moisture and flavour.

accessories.name: Stainless Steel Knob
accessories.description: Heat-resistant ergonomic knob attached to lid.

name: Le Creuset Signature Enamelled Cast Iron Round Casserole 20cm
